name: Nefer
title: "Secret Beneath the Sands" Nefer
desc: Seeking hidden secrets, to know all hearts.

attributes.source: Reward for inviting Nefer to a duel at The Cat's Tail and claiming victory in a Friendly Fracas with her

skills.name: Senet Strategy: Dance of a Thousand Nights
skills.desc: Deal ? ?. Attach 1 stack of RES to self. Before your next action, grant Cost Reduction to up to 3 highest-cost Seeds of Deceit in your Hand.

skills.name: Sacred Vow: True Eye's Phantasm
skills.desc: Deal ? ?. Deal +1 DMG for each Seeds of Deceit in your Hand (max +2)

skills.name: Moonsign Benediction: Dusklit Eaves
skills.desc:
(Passive) During this game, when your opponent is affected by Bloom reaction(s), the reaction will be converted to the Lunar-Bloom reaction.
When your Hand contains fewer than 3 Seeds of Deceit and the opponent is affected by the Lunar-Bloom reaction: Create 1 Seeds of Deceit in your Hand. (Twice per Round)
